features: Supports injured limbs and relieves discomfort during rest and activity
Comfortable stretchy fabric conforms easily to body parts
5m roll of size E bandage - suitable for legs and knees
description: Product Description The HypaBand Elasticated Tubular Support Bandage is ideal for supporting injured limbs and relieving join and muscle discomfort during rest or activity. A variety of tube sizes are available for limb injuries dependent on body part and size. Size E is suitable for use on areas like the legs or knees. The bandages are supportive and elastic and are supplied in 10 meter roll of un-cut bandage. Available in the following sizes: - Size B (Small Limbs) - Size C (Adult Hands) - Size D (Arms, Legs) - Size E (Legs, Knees) - Size F (Large Knees) - Size G (Large Thighs) Check the usage guide to ensure the correct bandage size is purchased. Directions Apply the bandage around the injured area, ensuring it is snug but not too tight, and secure it in place. Manufacturer Contact Information Safety First Aid Group See more
